programme.desc: In the main event, a shot at the ONE Flyweight World Championship is on the line, as Malaysia's very own Gianni Subba takes on the surging Reece McLaren.

programme.title: ONE Event
programme.desc: In the main event, ONE Bantamweight World Champion and living legend, Bibiano Fernandes, puts his belt on the line against ONE Featherweight & Lightweight World Champion Martin Nguyen, as he bids to become the first-ever triple-division titleholder.

programme.title: ONE Event
programme.desc: Every kick, every strike and every grapple in the full replays of the ONE Championships numbered events in 2018.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Straw Hats and company flee the crumbling laboratory, Caesar's desperate act of vengeance thwarts Joker's plan to forever silence his enemies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky continues his battle with Buffalo and Baby 5, Nami uses a mighty gust of wind to save the children from a deadly cloud of gas, and Usopp takes a shot at capturing Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On their way after having set out from Punk Hazard, the Straw Hats find out their next destination - just as a huge wave comes crashing down on the Sunny! But it's rough sailing for the G-5 as well, as Donflamingo arrives on the scene and wreaks havoc!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Aokiji's intercession saves Smoker and sends Joker off to rethink his strategy, leaving unanswered questions about Aokiji's current status. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats catch their breath as the Sunny makes its way through the rough seas of the New World.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smooth seas stretch out before the Straw Hats as they leave Punk Hazard far behind -- but while they fear Donflamingo's return and prepare to face him, another foe lies in wait, whose powers could be their downfall!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Breed has Luffy, Trafalgar, and Chopper firmly in his grasp with his Peto-Peto power! Breed dreams of a world in which he has enslaved all the humans, but Luffy's stubborn persistence and unwillingness to cooperate may have landed him in hot water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.

programme.title: NightMan

programme.desc: Investigating the disappearance of an old college friend, Will (ROBIN DUNNE) finds himself caught in an underground fight club where the combatants are genetically engineered abnormals who fight to the death like modern-day gladiators.

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police find a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness; after months of searching, police zero in on a local family man living a double life that no one suspects.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: The Half Hour

programme.title: The Half Hour

programme.title: The Half Hour
programme.desc: Michelle Buteau reveals how she met her husband and explains what it's like to be married to a white European man.

programme.title: The Half Hour

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Don't miss Last Comic Standing's Kathleen Madigan as she hosts an all-new hour of standup. Join Kathleen and four of America's funniest up and coming comics for a night of laugh-out-loud jokes that will have you rolling off the couch.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Get ready for a night of huge laughs with The View's Michelle Collins along with Travis Howze, John Bush and more. It's an hour of non-stop laugh-out-loud standup from New York's one and only Gotham Comedy Club.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Don't miss this rare chance to see the first female comic in history to land her own television special as she's joined by hilarious up-and-comers Mike Cross, Jen Kober and Ali Siddiq.

programme.title: Phyllis Diller: Not Just Another Pretty Face

programme.title: Natasha Leggero: Live at Bimbo's

programme.title: Nikki Glaser: Perfect

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches for a valuable Zero Point Module rumored to be hidden on the planet Dagan, where the Sudarians were trusted with the module over 10,000 years ago. In their search the team begin to worry about their new allies, and their motives

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With no recollection of how they got to the Destiny, crew members left behind over a year earlier make a mysterious return. After an unsettling turn, the memories stirred through regression therapy prove disastrous for those who’ve returned.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: In the hopes of finding something beneficial, the crew follows an energy signature that leads them to a mysterious sea of lifeless ships. With no visible signs of danger, the crew set off to take a closer look. But things may not be what they seem.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Locked in a battle with a Drone Command Ship, the Destiny is surprised by the arrival of the aliens that abducted Rush and Chloe. After Destiny's position is revealed, the crew again comes under heavy attack. But this time, they have a plan.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Excitement spreads through the ship as Eli believes he’s found a way to dial Earth. But Dr. Rush has serious reservations about abandoning Destiny, and when the crew is interrupted by a distress call, it may just change the plans of the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Quinn is conflicted when a professor from his home planet asks SG-1 to help stage a coup against the Kelownan government in order to stop a civil war. Should SG-1 allow the planet to destroy itself…or are they placing themselves in needless danger?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Two scientists working on an off-world research project witness SG-1 captured in a Goa'uld raid and attempt to rescue them. Little do they know that SG-1 staged the capture in order to infiltrate the Goa'uld and make contact with a Tok'ra informant.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Tok'ra must take refuge from the Goa'uld at the SGC Alpha Site occupied by Jaffa. Bad blood between the races begins to boil as an assassin wreaks havoc on the camp. Can O'Neill stop the bloodshed before the assassin escapes with coordinates?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 visits Pangar, a planet inhabited by humans who have developed a drug that makes their immune systems perfect. Unknown to SG-1 is the means by which the drug is produced, a startling discovery that may hold the key to the origins of the Tok'ra!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Rogue NSA officers hijack the X-303 spaceship and demand that Adrian Conrad be brought to the ship. Using his Goa'uld knowledge, Conrad activates the X-303 and takes the ship light-years from Earth as O'Neill and Teal'c stage a daring rescues.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 is marooned in deep space, Thor comes to the rescue. He then seek O'Neill's help to combat the Replicators. Convinced they will attack earth if not stopped, O'Neill stages a daring mission to stop the Replicators once and for all.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 returns from a mission with an artifact that triggers the ability to see hideous yet harmless life forms in a parallel reality. As the effect spreads to civilians, O'Neill and his team must find a solution before mass hysteria breaks out.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Senator Kinsey suffers an assassination attempt while campaigning for the presidency, and O'Neill is caught on tape leaving the building where the shots were fired. With O'Neill behind bars, Carter, Teal'c and Jonas must prove his innocence.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After the Halliwell sisters witness the kidnapping of Piper’s (Holly Marie Combs) friend (guest star Maureen Muldoon) son (guest star Scott Tera), they discover it’s the work of the Grimlocks, demons who take the sight away from young boys.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper leaves town for a convention, Prue and Phoebe discover a long-dead convict has been brought to life as a ghost and is murdering people who had anything to do with his conviction.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: White-Lighter Leoeturns to help rescue Daisy, a young woman on her way to becoming a White Lighter, he’s injured by the evil Alex, who once loved and is now out to get Daisy.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After repeated, unsuccessful attempts at trying to get to the Charmed Ones, Rodriguez (guest star Carlos Gomez) is aided by time sorcerer Tempus Fugit (guest star David Carradine) who traps the Halliwells in a time loop.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: On their first anniversary of becoming witches, the sisters face a cloven-hoofed demon called Abraxas, that steals the Book of Shadows and undoes the spells they've cast, releasing old vanquished enemies of the Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue tries to save a man trapped inside a painting only to get trapped herself. Piper ends up inside the painting, too, and the two sisters begin to realize the man may not be as innocent as he claims.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Leo lures the manager of Dishwalla to P3, aware that the manager has made a pact with a demon that grants him fame and fortune in exchange for innocent souls.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris tries everything to hide an "F" on his report card from his parents.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Rochelle's father dies unexpectedly, instead of grieving, she acts as if nothing's wrong.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Sick of being second best to his little brother, Chris decides to enroll in karate classes.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Discovering that Emmet faked his own death, Victoria decides to follow suit to be with him, as Simon rethinks his career, and Melanie dates a guy who doesn't spoon correctly.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria is shocked when her daughter Emmy shows up very pregnant, Bob tells his parents he's engaged to Joy, Melanie's dentist is misled by texts, and Elka has a fling.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Determined to secure Oscar nomination votes, Victoria has the women target a former heartthrob, a young actress and an old-time Western star.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Melanie capitalizes on her brain tumor to meet a singer, Joy sleeps with a tell-all DJ, and Victoria has an online romance that isn't what it seems.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: When their dog George acts depressed, the women bring in an animal-communicating radio host, who advises them to remove the negativity in their household.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland

programme.desc: Joy is jealous that her new boss Mitch has eyes for Melanie, Elka strategizes with her campaign manager, and Victoria awaits her possible Oscar nomination.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria, Joy and Elka each have their own reasons in imploring Melanie to date a billionaire newspaper publisher, who confides in her a disturbing secret.

programme.title: Raising Expectations

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Wayne and Conner are on opposite sides of the debate on whether or not to chop down the front yard tree. Adam and Bently work together to fix the air conditioner.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Conner's date is ruined by her brothers' snobbery masquerading as overprotectiveness. When Emmett discovers he can get a discount on his bike repair in exchange for a date with his sister, Conner jumps at the chance.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Emmett will do anything to get to a local hot dog eating contest, even if it means disobeying Paige and tunneling through the basement wall to freedom. Adam and Bentley stumble upon a mysterious stash of chocolate covered raisins.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: During an online lecture, Paige shares a heroic story from Wayne’s past that may or may not be true. The kids take on internet trolls attacking Wayne’s story but start to question if the online community is right about their dad.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Emmett enlists his siblings to help him manufacture t-­‐shirts in the garage, but it turns out the logo Emmett was using is in violation of a charity’s copyright. Now Emmett has to reimburse the charity, but he’s already spent the money.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Bentley's club, “The Sophisticates” is embroiled in a turf war with a rival club, “The Aficionados” over ownership of the best library spot. To solve their problem Bentley hosts a quip-off which quickly devolves into an ill-­mannered affair.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora siente que el tiempo se le agota, piensa en matar a Gabriela si no firma los poderes. Una enfermera ficticia toma la silla de ruedas de Martín y lo ayuda a fugarse del psiquiátrico.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Don Martín y Hortencia logran escapar del sanatorio, Bustillo ordena a los guardias que los busquen, pero no los hallan. Gabriela está arrepentida por no escuchar las advertencias de sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando enfurece al no encontrar las joyas que Gabriela tiene guardadas, se pone a la defensiva cuando Norma llega con Eva a revisar la casa. Dínora amenaza a Gabriela para que no grite.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Don Martín está feliz, luego de tanto sufrimiento, se reencuentra con sus nietas. Gabriela se enfrenta a Fernando y a Dínora, no aguanta más el encierro, quiere saber de su padre y sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan decide rescatar a Gabriela y va solo a la hacienda Elizondo a buscarla. Martín cuenta los tormentos por los que pasó, le asegura a todos que Dínora y Fernando son amantes y cómplices.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela se sorprende al ver a Juan, no esperaba que él arriesgara su vida por ella. Fernando y Dínora se desesperan al ser descubiertos, le disparan a Franco, la policía está en alerta.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora toma a Gabriela y a Juan de rehenes, trata de negociar un rescate con la policía y amenaza a Norma. Pepa visita a Martín, le cuenta las sospechas que tiene de los malos pasos de Armando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco y Armando reviven viejas enemistades, el amigo de Fernando dispara y quien resulta herida es Rosario, luego de un forcejeo, Armando paga con la muerte. Los captores están acorralados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela grita para que Raquel la escuche y la ayude, la amiga va al sótano y la ve amordazada, al no poderla liberar huye y tiene un accidente fatal. Se cumple otro sueño premonitorio de Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth está desconsolada por la muerte de sus padres, ahora más que nunca necesita el apoyo de sus amigos. Dínora tortura psicológicamente a Gabriela, le dice que por su culpa, Raquel murió.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En medio del funeral, Benito arma un escándalo, le reclama a Ruth por dejar sola a Raquel y le dice que ella no tiene derecho a disponer de la fortuna. Ruth presenta a su verdadera madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dan lectura al testamento de Raquel, la sorpresa es general cuando nombran heredera universal a Eva. Don Martín tiene planes de escapar del hospital psiquiátrico, busca ayuda para salir.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora siente que el tiempo se le agota, piensa en matar a Gabriela si no firma los poderes. Una enfermera ficticia toma la silla de ruedas de Martín y lo ayuda a fugarse del psiquiátrico.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Don Martín y Hortencia logran escapar del sanatorio, Bustillo ordena a los guardias que los busquen, pero no los hallan. Gabriela está arrepentida por no escuchar las advertencias de sus hijas.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Twelve Teams stand at the start line in Los Angeles, Calif., but only 11 will make the journey to Tokyo, Japan as the Racers are faced with a heart-breaking surprise elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams struggle to combat the hectic pace of Vietnam and one Team puts their own Race in jeopardy by offering to help the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams scramble to spot royalty in the jam-packed streets of Cambodia and one Team monkeys around and breaks the Race's cardinal rule by losing their passport.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams sweat it out searching sand dunes for water in the blistering sun and one racer decides to help his competition hoping karma will be on their side in the end.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams slide six stories into a shark tank and one racer must conquer her fear of heights to make it through this leg of the race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In 1990, Mary Bradford of Kannapolis, North Carolina took one parrot into her house in need of care, now her commitment has grown to more than 275 birds. Mary's unique care center is believed to be the only retirement home of its kind for exotic birds.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his daughter Suzanne as they put their skills to the test at Shamwari's Ranger School where they must experience everything from driving a 4x4, to tracking animals on foot, including a very up-close look at a pride of hungry Lions.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets some animals that stockpile food and supplies. Check out the fascinating behaviors of Leaf-cutter Ants, Bears, Leopards, Honey Bees, Camels and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the largest African elephant Jack has ever seen, to the littlest elephants on the planet…come along for the journey of a lifetime with the biggest land mammals on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Central Florida, Jack assists in the release of eight captive-born Whooping Cranes, considered among the rarest and most endangered birds in the world. Jack also goes up in a helicopter for the annual survey of Florida's Bald Eagle population.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Ebb and Flow
programme.desc: Being an animal is thirsty work! Learn how water impacts the lives of elephants, hippos, caiman, giraffes and more! Six stories about the water supply in diverse ecosystems around the planet.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In southern Brazil, Jack and Kathaleen boat up a raging river to Iguassu Falls, the world's largest. At the base of the falls, dad and daughter marvel at the unusual nesting site for thousands of Swifts.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On the Caribbean Island of Dominica, Jack climbs up Morne Diablotin in search of the Sisserou, the world's most endangered parrot. Jack also encounters a large Boa Constrictor, then tries to keep pace with a “mountain” chicken.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a weird and wonderful countdown celebrating some of the most unique animals on Earth. Pink River Dolphins, Emus, Sichuan Takin, Okapi, Gerenuk, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Peru is brimming with unique wildlife, come along as Jungle Jack takes the adventure of a lifetime down the mighty Amazon! From Tapir and Sloth to Pink River Dolphins and Giant River Otters, this is a journey you won't want to miss!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Big Bear Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down his coolest bear experiences… trekking the elusive spirit bear in Alaska, helping return a grizzly to his home in Montana, and meeting an adorable baby black bear in New Mexico. Plus 7 more amazing bear experiences.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: After her floatplane touches down on Kulik Lake, Jack's daughter, Kathaleen, joins him in the Katmai region of Alaska for some brown bear watching and fly-fishing.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he searches for the greatest ape species, like Gorillas, Orangutans, Chimpanzees, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Predator Alert
programme.desc: Aggressive carnivores sometimes seem like the bad guys of the animal kingdom, but top predators play an essential role: keeping nature in balance. Today, Jungle Jack is counting down nature’s supreme hunters, like lions, crocs, leopards and hyenas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack explores villages that are way off the beaten path to meet the people who live there and the animals that surround them, like cheetahs in South Africa, spider monkeys in the Amazon, hippos along the Zambezi, lions in Kenya and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Stuck on You
programme.desc: Today, Jack is counting down animals that count on each other! Birds that groom buffalo, lions that feed jackals, and catfish fed by bats are just some of the amazing symbiotic relationships on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In a rainforest outside Rio de Janeiro, Jack visits a breeding program that's slowly restoring the wild population of endangered Golden Lion Tamarins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack explores tributaries off the Panama Canal in search of wildlife like Capuchin Monkeys, Geoffroy's Tamarins, Spectacled Caimans, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Take a step back into the past, and get a unique behind the scenes tour of the famous Hearst Castle in California. Stephen Hearst, the great grandson of William Randolph Hearst gives Jack the grand tour of the family ranch.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Big Green Eating Machines
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a massive countdown filled with the planet’s most voracious vegetarians like elephants, hippos, rhinos and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a cold-blooded countdown! Crocodiles, Puff Adders, Sea Turtles, Caiman, Fer de Lance and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of animal care with Jack to a special turtle hospital in Marathon, Fla. See what it takes to rehabilitate the reptiles and watch a release back Into the Wild! Then Jack visits the Dolphin Research Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi head deep into South Africa's Addo National Park to learn more about its famous Elephant population, and the rest of the Big Seven that call Addo home.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack discovers Costa Rica's Tortuguero National Park. He has a once-in-a-lifetime encounter with a wild Jaguar and meets Toucans, Monkeys, and Caimans all before checking out life in the remote village.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top of the Pach-yderm
programme.desc: Join Jack for a colossal countdown with the mighty pachyderms! From the biggest land mammal in the world, the African elephant, to Borneo’s pygmy elephant, Jungle Jack is counting down his favorite elephant encounters all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack travels to the Florida Keys to visit a hospital dedicated to saving sea turtles. They return a rescued sea turtle back to the wild and meet some incredible patients at the hospital.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's comin' home to the Columbus Zoo in Ohio where he gives his grandkids a behind-the-scenes tour. Join in as they learn the ins and outs of zookeeping while meeting amazing animals like elephants, a clouded leopard, and a baby koala.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Romance and intrigue combine with the mystery of a famous international jewel as The Love Boat sails amid the scenic beauty of the Aegean Sea - including the glorious sights of the Greek Islands and Turkey.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: While the Pacific Princess sails through the beautiful waters of Italy, a seemingly happy couple (Shelly Winters and Ernest Borgnine) reveals that their relationship is far from perfect.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Love, adventure and romantic hijinks are afloat when The Love Boat sails to the beautiful Eternal City of Rome and the sites of glorious Capri and Venice in a special two-hour premiere.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A mindreader meets a man and uses the reading to improve her chances at getting his attention. Meanwhile, Capt. Stubing's friend brags about his son's accomplishments, but Vicki hears a totally different story.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy is torn between his biological father, who he hasn't seen since he was a baby, and the stepfather who raised him. Meanwhile, Elaine tries to tell her parents that her fiance is a paraplegic.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A woman's (Greer Garson) ability to see the future may hinder her relationship with an attractive man. Plus, a single mother thinks she meets a divorced man traveling with his daughter, but that's not exactly the case.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Angelorum Dominicus suddenly appears aboard the Pacific Princess without a reservation and soon begins to spread love and happiness to everyone on the cruise, especially a little boy in need of an operation.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A female producer is adamant about not wanting to start a relationship with an actor, but the thespian has other plans. Meanwhile, a therapist goes on a cruise with his group, while Doc and his nephew compete for the affection of the same woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Gopher suspects a skipper under Capt. Stubing's tutelage is trying to take his job, the crew jumps into action to protect their boss. Meanwhile, a lovely lady causes havoc when she boards with two men who are each after her hand.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A woman's (Joan Rivers) shyness around men is exacerbated by her recent mastectomy that is until she meets an understanding man. Meanwhile, when a married couple contemplates divorce, it's their son, who's also a lawyer, that gets caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When an elderly man's granddaughter falls for one of his fresh-faced friends, the man seeks out some of the youth potion for himself. Meanwhile, things start moving a little too fast for Isaac and the woman he's dating.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A sarcastic woman (Anne Meara) goes on a rampage when she finds out she's on a cruise with the same man she's suing (Jerry Stiller) for damages. Meanwhile, a famous professor meets a former student who is hired to replace his mentor/

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Stubing meets a gorgeous movie queen (Joan Collins), who recently shed her ninth husband, he is fascinated by her charm and beauty. Then, a man decides to prioritize golf over his wife, so the neglected woman decides to play ball with an old friend.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The captain's daughter is put in a tough situation she is accused of stealing supplements from Doc's office. Then, Gopher's uncle (Red Button) falls in love with the lady who runs the ship's gift shop.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin, and Godwin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.desc: When Jep and Jessica move into Willie and Jase's neighborhood, Jep is sidelined with an illness.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After his accidental transportation to Cybertron, Megatron returns- and he wants to get his hands on an anti-matter formula created on Earth that could mean limitless power for the Decepticons! Bumblebee and Spike race to warn the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one—the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one - the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons begin to siphon the Earth's heat from the Arctic Circle and temperatures worldwide begin to drop. But unknown to the Decepticons is what, or who, they are about to release from the ice.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Inspired by dinosaur skeletons, Ratchet and Wheeljack create Grimlock, Slag, and Sludge, the Dinobots! When Autobot forces are captured by the Decepticons, it may be up to the Dinobots to save the day.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Optimus Prime assigns the Dinobots to guard a meteorite that contains new and unknown energy. Appealing to Grimlocks' simple arrogance, Megatron convinces the Dinobots to attack Optimus Prime and betray the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. With help from a human scientist, the Decepticons enslave people through mind control to fight against the Autobots and generate enough power for Megatron's sinister plan: bringing Cybertron into Earth's orbit to steal all of its energy.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 3. With Cybertron now in orbit, the Earth is being torn apart by geological forces and natural disasters. A small Autobot team heads to Cybertron to stop Megatron, while the rest of the Autobots try to protect Earth. But is it already too late?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons’ hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. Following a civil war on planet Cyberton, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years! Finally reawakened, the battle between good and evil continues on present-day Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. Using their robotic powers to hide in plain sight, the Autobots and Decepticons disguise themselves as Earth vehicles, and their war between good vs. evil continues as the Autobots try to stop the Decepticons from stealing Earth's resources.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. The Decepticons' ship to planet Cybertron is complete, and the odds are stacked against Optimus Prime, Bumblebee, Jazz and the others in the battle to stop them.

programme.desc: Some of Rev's husbandly habits are wearing thin on Justine and leaving her feeling disrespected. Rev is shocked to hear that there are a "few" things to improve and challenges Justine to make a list.

programme.title: Run's House

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: The Harris family is embarking on a new business venture together - lemonade! The kids decide they want to start a lemonade business and Tip and Tameka are there to help them every step of the way.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinah has a new hair product for sale and she wants to promote it by enlisting Tameka's help in producing an infomercial. Meanwhile, Tip takes his sons to a very special event.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinah's chain smoking is driving Tameka crazy so she decides to take her to a hypnotist. Tip takes the kids to his old neighborhood where he shocks them with a very interesting hometown game.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka and Shekinah decide to compete in a series of athletic events to determine who's the better athlete with the loser answering to King. Tip takes Domani and Messiah to a real science lab to learn about cool experiments.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka and Shekinah decide to go out to the country for some fun, but quickly learn country living is tougher than it looks. Back at home, Messiah has gotten himself into a sticky situation and asks Tip for help.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tip arrives home to find Precious out of sorts. The boys have been running rampant in the house and Precious can't take it anymore. Tip decides it's time once again for T.I. P.I. to do an all-out investigation into her claims.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tip decides to teach Major the art of Pranking. Meanwhile, Niq Niq and Deyjah convince Tameka to take them out for a day of adventure. Tameka agrees but reveals she has ulterior motives.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka asks Major to take her out on a pretend-date so King can teach Major how to be a gentleman. But when they get to the arcade, Major has other plans. Meanwhile, Tip is convinced he should have his own cooking show.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After a string of painfully punny jokes, Tip decides Domani needs lessons in the art of comedy from one of his famous friends. Meanwhile, Tameka holds the Mother-Daughter pageant of her dreams.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Domani thinks he's ready for a record deal, but Tip doesn't believe in handing it to him until he earns it. Back at home, Tameka discovers Major has a paralyzing phobia of water and immediately enrolls him in swimming lessons.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: The Harris family wants to raise money for a charity close to their heart and choose to put on a carnival. While Tameka is in charge of setting up the games, Tip brings Domani to a magic shop to hone in his skills.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: Follow the Rules

programme.desc: Brittney brings her new boyfriend home for Thanksgiving, and Ja gets more information about their relationship than he bargained for. The grannies compete to see who can bake the best pie.

programme.title: Follow the Rules

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Savannah and Stevie Jr. try to manage Dorian's career. Stevie gets a culture shock when he tries to woo a French beauty. At K. Michelle's suggestion, Stevie meets with a PR exec for tips on how to launch his party venture Sleazy J's!

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vickie Lynn McCoy finally breaks her silence about her actions against The Beast before the two women meet in the ring, while the Mother Truckers: Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag get another chance for comeuppance against Las Bandidas.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie vows to be a new kind of fighting champion as she defends her title against challenger Tormenta. Adriana Gambino makes a case for a WOW World Championship opportunity in her match against Stephy Slays, while BK Rhythm and Gigi Gianni.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Mother Truckers are pleased to offer their services to WOW Owner David McLane as he strives to return order to WOW - by volunteering to handcuff themselves to managers Lana Star and Sophia Lopez in the Main Event Tag Match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast seeks revenge in the worst way with a warning from the Fabulous Lana Star to remember before one embarks on the journey of revenge one should dig two graves. This main event match is too dangerous for WOW to sanction.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonga Twins face the most difficult challenge to date. Chainsaw aims to continue her path of destruction against Stephy Slays - will anyone in the locker room be able to control her? Team Spirit looks to gain both momentum and recruits in their match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The roadside dining, truck stop-loving Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag, finally get a chance to even the score with the high life jet setting Miami's Sweet Heat for the brutal beatdown three weeks prior in The Main Event. Jessie Jones makes a deal.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones strives to make good on her deal with McLane in her opening match against Genesis and be added to the Championship Challenge Main Event. Jennifer Florez challenges IQ Superior's Classmaster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone's got a problem with David McLane after last week's Championship Challenge Match. David placates the angry roster by offering all participants a chance at the new champion - who's more than willing to face each of them.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After two groundbreaking wins, Champion Abilene Maverick finally re-introduces herself to the WOW audience. Backstage, as teams start to assemble for The WOW Trios Tournament, Team Spirit has a major announcement with major ramifications.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With Amber O'Neal by her side, Jessie Jones makes her intentions towards former tag partner Americana crystal clear. With Amber by her side, however, Jessie might just provoke another former WOW Superhero to step up. Gloria Glitter aims to make a stance.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star and The Fab Four aim to be back on top with the gold this week in Penelope Pink's Main Event Championship Match against WOW Champion Abilene Maverick.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW Trios Tournament officially kicks off as Team Spirit and Team IQ Superior both look to pick up the first win and advance.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The next Tag Team Championship Match is on everybody's minds as The Tonga Twins set up a Fatal Four Way Main Event to determine their next challenger. The Trios Tournament continues as Stephy Slays and The Mighty Mights face a fractured Team Exile.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: There's no stopping Americana as she challenges Jessie Jones to a one-on-one contest in The Main Event, despite concerns from Santana Garrett. The Brat Pack is joined by an intriguing third member as they enter the first round of the Trios Tournament.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Time is almost up before the missile's explosion destroys Yugi and friends! Will the Battle City finalists beat the clock and live to duel another day in the stunning conclusion to the virtual world saga!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends arrive at KaibaCorp Island where the Battle City finalists will compete in the ultimate dueling arena! Get ready for the awesome four-person battle royal where any duelist can attack anyone else!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Honor, friendship, revenge... As each duelist remembers what they're fighting for, the battle royal rages on where none of the duelists know where the next attack is going to come from!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey may have fought some of the fiercest fights in Battle City, but has all his training taught him to become an elite duelist? Joey's gonna show what he's made of in the conclusion to the four-man battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik ensnares Joey in a Shadow Game where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters... literally! Every time a monster received damage, the duelist feels the pain instead!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik's Helpoemer send Joey's powerful cards to the graveyard before Joey can use them! Running low on cards and life points, Joey's opportunities for staging a comeback are nearly depleted!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey thinks this duel can't turn any worse... but Marik has all the pieces necessary to summon The Winged Dragon of Ra! Can Joey prevent Marik from summoning the Egyptian God Card, or is victory simply not in the cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik transforms The Winged Dragon of Ra into its powerful form, the Egyptian God Phoenix! If Joey can't withstand the Phoenix's blazing fire, he'll lose the duel... plus his only chance to save Mai from her mental prison!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the rematch we've all been waiting for! Yugi and Kaiba square off for the first time since Duelist Kingdom in front of thousands of ravenous fans for the right to challenge Marik! It's time to duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba has all the monsters necessary to summon Obelisk the Tormentor to finish Yugi off! Though overwhelmed and outmatched, nothing is going to stop Yugi from trying to summon his Egyptian God first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon clashes against Kaiba's Obelisk the Tormentor, what will happen when two Egyptian Gods fight each other? It's time to find out which Egyptian God is truly stronger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's insults, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City Tournament! Has Joey mastered enough strategies to take down the top dog, or is Kaiba going to wallop Joey like a pathetic puppy?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba attacks with his mighty Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but Joey has no monsters to defend with! Joey's luck has run out, so it's time for him to rely on skill!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Kaiba's battle reaches its roaring climax! Will Joey take down his biggest headache and actually teach Kaiba a thing or two about being a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the critical Battle City showdown with the fate of the world at stake: Yami Yugi vs. Marik! If Yami Yugi loses, Yugi is taking a permanent vacation into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Yugi at the end of his ropes and the maniacal Marik waging all-out war, can Marik's oldest friend reach Marik in time to help him come to his senses before his insanity overwhelms him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Will the combined force of all of Yugi's monsters be enough to defeat an Egyptian God that terminated two other powerful Egyptian Gods? The fate of the world hangs in the balance with the finale of the Battle City Tournament!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: KaibaCorp Island is set to explode in mere minutes, but the blimp's engines are offline! Can Yugi and friends escape from the island in time, or will they sink to the bottom of the sea?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.desc: The Beavers fix up Ker-Splash Canyon, an amazing water park; when rushing water endangers a group of reclusive Dodos and threatens to destroy the canyon, the Cadets race underground to rescue the Dodos and save the canyon.

programme.desc: When Rocco and Chomps race off in Penny's Aqua-Wing, she must use Chomp's sub to get it back; as Sandy Stork delivers party treats to the school, the Banana Bandits take her plane.
